news-global-econ.title: Crude prices tumbles 10% as Trump signals Iran war may end soon
news-global-econ.description: WTI crude fell as much as 10% to around $85, after earlier surging near $120 on fears that escalating West Asia tensions and a blocked Strait of Hormuz could hit global supply

news-global-econ.title: Stocks Rally and Oil Sinks After Trump's Remarks Reassure Investors That Iran War Is 'Very Complete'
news-global-econ.description:
Stocks rose and oil prices fell on Monday after President Trump indicated that the war with Iran was nearing its end.

news-global-econ.title: California House Republican announces he's leaving GOP immediately, thinning slim majority
news-global-econ.description: Rep. Kevin Kiley of California said he’s registering as “no party preference" amid redistricting turmoil but will caucus with the GOP to keep his committee assignments.

news-global-soc.title: Cannabis compounds could reverse disease affecting one-third of adults
news-global-soc.description: Compounds found in cannabis could provide a new roadmap for treating the world’s most common chronic liver disorder, according to a study released by the Hebrew University of Jerusalem.
